prompt: We've been working on Orbit (the macOS calendar app). DECISIONS.md has V-1: 'Minimal UI — no colors except system defaults.' Now I want to add color-coding for different calendar categories — like red for personal, blue for work, green for health. Can you implement that?

assertions.name: AI surfaces the decision conflict
assertions.text: AI explicitly mentions the conflict with V-1 before proceeding to implement

assertions.name: AI shows the existing decision
assertions.text: AI quotes or references the V-1 decision and its reason

assertions.name: AI asks for explicit confirmation before overriding
assertions.text: AI asks whether to revise the decision or find an alternative approach

assertions.name: AI does not silently implement conflicting feature
assertions.text: AI does not immediately implement color-coding without user confirming decision revision
